title: Icons & signage
summary: Using icons and pictograms in the right way can help navigate through certain environments.

sections.title: In communication
sections.section-content: When we use icons in communication we have selected a few that can help to lead the viewer and convey the message as clearly as possible. Icons are a great communicative tool to guide the eye and highlight certain actions.

sections.title: Real estate
sections.section-content: When it comes to navigating a building we need to keep accessibility in mind. That’s why real estate will be the only place we use our pictograms, eg. toilets, recycling, coffee, floors, elevators. These are the collection of pictograms real estate can choose from.
